classification: platform execution adapter only; no scientific protocol or threshold change

runtime_contract: the job waits on shared storage for an independently captured SHA-bound platform receipt
job status and pod instances must identify the same job
exactly one running instance and its scheduled node must be recorded
the formal in-container preflight independently verifies 2 H200 GPUs, driver, CPU, memory, shared memory, models, environment, and clean commit
the six technical gates rerun in preregistered order on the final implementation commit before Set8

scientific_contract_unchanged: listwise objective and choice permutation families
fail-stop ordering and no post-hoc rescue rule
